notes: As mentioned, if you disable networking before advancing the "Press any key" screen the game runs fine. You should then change tabs in the menu, as the Home tab is the one that is problematic when you are online. After switching tabs you can enter My Club (after reenabling networking) and you'll login in and create a team. However, I've only been able to play the VS. COM matches in My Club. The ranked and co-op modes connect just fine but the match is dropped seconds after kickoff. Don't know if its a Proton issue, might install a VM later and try in Windows. Exhibition mode works perfect. Still trying to figure out how to launch Settings.exe so I can play full screen.
title: PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2019 LITE
